reasoning: The market probability was 0.02 on October 30, 2025. My searches through the knowledge cutoff of November 9, 2025 confirm that there has been no official announcement of a divorce between Donald and Melania Trump. While there are ongoing rumors and claims by commentators (like Michael Wolff), these have been disputed, and no reputable sources report an actual divorce filing or announcement. Furthermore, historically no sitting US president has ever divorced while in office. Given that only about 52 days remain in the year and the fact that an announcement hasn't occurred and would be politically costly, the probability remains exceptionally low. Per system instructions to keep probabilities between 0.05 and 0.95, I am submitting the minimum allowed value of 0.05.
